scripts.build: npm run pdf && npm run epub && npm run html
scripts.epub:validate: npm run epub && python skills/format-book-agent/scripts/epubcheck_with_summary.py output/book-interior.epub output/epubcheck-report.json
scripts.epub:full:validate: npm run epub:full && python skills/format-book-agent/scripts/epubcheck_with_summary.py output/book-full.epub output/epubcheck-report-full.json
scripts.epub:all: npm run epub:validate && npm run epub:full:validate
scripts.publish: npm run pdf:pdfx && npm run epub:validate
